  (: If 
    (-> Bool Atom Atom))
  (= 
    (If True $then) $then)
  (= 
    (If False $then) 
    (let $x 0 
      (let $x 1 $x)))
  (: If 
    (-> Bool Atom Atom Atom))
  (= 
    (If $cond $then $else) 
    (if $cond $then $else))
  (= 
    (f $x) 42)
;; In file as:  
  !(let $y 
    (superpose (3 4 5)) 
    (If 
      (> $y 3) 
      (case 
        (1 $y) 
        ( ( (1 3) (f 0)) 
          ( (1 4) (42 42)) 
          ($else (1 1))))))
;; To unit test case:
  !(assertEqualToResult 
    (let $y 
      (superpose (3 4 5)) 
      (If 
        (> $y 3) 
        (case 
          (1 $y) 
          ( ( (1 3) (f 0)) 
            ( (1 4) (42 42)) 
            ($else (1 1)))))) 
    ( (42 42) (1 1)))

[

;
;; METTA-MORPH-TESTS.LET-SUPERPOSE-IF-CASE.01

; 
; EVAL TEST
; took 0.002 secs. (2.05 milliseconds) 

  !(assertEqualToResult 
    (let $y 
      (superpose (3 4 5)) 
      (If 
        (> $y 3) 
        (case 
          (1 $y) 
          ( ( (1 3) (f 0)) 
            ( (1 4) (42 42)) 
            ($else (1 1)))))) 
    ( (42 42) (1 1)))

  (loonit_success  
    (equal_enough_for_test  
      ( (42 42) (1 1)) 
      ( (42 42) (1 1))))


  (= (error  (existence_error  procedure (/  trace_on_pass 0)) (context  (:  system (/   1)) $_6950))  
    (,  
      (eval_H  500 &self 
        (assertEqualToResult 
          (let $_4546 
            (superpose (3 4 5)) 
            (If 
              (> $_4546 3) 
              (case 
                (1 $_4546) 
                ( ( (1 3) (f 0)) 
                  ( (1 4) (42 42)) 
                  ($_4762 (1 1)))))) 
          ( (42 42) (1 1))) $_4122) 
      (,  
        (deterministic  $_4970) 
        (,  
          (xform_out  $_4122 $_4998) 
          (nb_setarg  1 
            (res  $_3320) $_4998)))))




  (= (error  (existence_error  procedure (/  trace_on_pass 0)) (context  (:  system (/   1)) $_6950))  
    (,  
      (eval_H  500 &self 
        (assertEqualToResult 
          (let $_4546 
            (superpose (3 4 5)) 
            (If 
              (> $_4546 3) 
              (case 
                (1 $_4546) 
                ( ( (1 3) (f 0)) 
                  ( (1 4) (42 42)) 
                  ($_4762 (1 1)))))) 
          ( (42 42) (1 1))) $_4122) 
      (,  
        (deterministic  $_4970) 
        (,  
          (xform_out  $_4122 $_4998) 
          (nb_setarg  1 
            (res  $_3320) $_4998)))))

  !(assertEqualToResult 
    (let $y 
      (superpose (3 4 5)) 
      (If 
        (> $y 3) 
        (case 
          (1 $y) 
          ( ( (1 3) (f 0)) 
            ( (1 4) (42 42)) 
            ($else (1 1)))))) 
    ( (42 42) (1 1)))
